title: Tumor Microenvironmental Regulation of CAR T-Cell Therapy in High Risk Medulloblastoma.
snippet: : B7-H3-directed chimeric antigen receptor (CAR) T cell therapy has demonstrated clinical safety and antitumor activity in pediatric brain tumors (pBTs) but lacks durable responses. Although preclinical studies show efficacy, the CAR designs that best support sustained function in immunosuppressive tumor microenvironments (TMEs) remain unclear. Group 3 medu...
